input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.8.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.8.3
            TITLE: the interlock is a wire or connection that must:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.8.3: The Interlock is a wire or connection that must:
EV.7.8.3 The Interlock is a wire or connection that must: 
a. Open the Shutdown Circuit EV.7.2.2 if the Interlock connection is broken or interrupted 
b. Not be in the low (ground) connection to the AIR coils of the Shutdown Circuit

final_answer: The Interlock is a wire or connection that must: a. Open the Shutdown Circuit EV.7.2.2 if the Interlock connection is broken or interrupted b. Not be in the low (ground) connection to the AIR coils of the Shutdown Circuit
